scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "cd apps/api && npm run dev" "cd apps/web && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd apps/api && npm run build && cd ../../apps/web && npm run build
scripts.db:migrate:dev: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd apps/api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.redis:flush: docker compose exec redis redis-cli FLUSHDB
